subcodes.first_line: Unto Thee be praise, O my God, for having kindled the lamp of Thy oneness betwixt Thy heaven and Thy earth, and for having sustained it with the oil of Thy wisdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لک الحمد یا الهی بما اوقدت سراج احدیتک بین سمائک و ارضک و امددته بدهن حکمتک و
subcodes.subjects: @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @prayer for praise and gratitude, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution
